{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Goldsign arms
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] possesses six [[Goldsign arms]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
